ddls:
CREATE TABLE "financial_data" (
  "symbol" TEXT /* Stock symbol of the company */,
  "as_of_date" TEXT /* Date as of which the data is reported */,
  "period_type" TEXT /* Type of period for which the data is reported (e.g., 12M for annual) */,
  "currency_code" TEXT /* Currency code in which the financial data is reported */,
  "beginning_cash_position" REAL /* Beginning cash position for the period */,
  "cash_dividends_paid" REAL /* Cash dividends paid during the period */,
  "change_in_accrued_expense" REAL /* Change in accrued expenses during the period */,
  "change_in_cash_supplemental_as_reported" REAL /* Change in cash as reported in the supplemental financial statements */,
  "change_in_other_current_assets" REAL /* Change in other current assets during the period */,
  "change_in_other_current_liabilities" REAL /* Change in other current liabilities during the period */,
  "change_in_payable" REAL /* Change in accounts payable during the period */,
  "change_in_prepaid_assets" REAL /* Change in prepaid assets during the period */,
  "change_in_receivables" REAL /* Change in accounts receivable during the period */,
  "change_in_working_capital" REAL /* Change in working capital during the period */,
  "changes_in_cash" REAL /* Total changes in cash for the period */,
  "common_stock_dividend_paid" REAL /* Dividends paid on common stock during the period */,
  "end_cash_position" REAL /* Ending cash position for the period */,
  "financing_cash_flow" REAL /* Cash flow from financing activities */,
  "free_cash_flow" REAL /* Free cash flow for the period */,
  "gain_loss_on_investment_securities" REAL /* Gains or losses on investment securities */,
  "issuance_of_debt" REAL /* Debt issuance during the period */,
  "long_term_debt_issuance" REAL /* Long-term debt issuance during the period */,
  "long_term_debt_payments" REAL /* Long-term debt payments during the period */,
  "net_income" REAL /* Net income for the period */,
  "net_income_from_continuing_operations" REAL /* Net income from continuing operations */,
  "net_issuance_payments_of_debt" REAL /* Net payments of debt during the period */,
  "net_long_term_debt_issuance" REAL /* Net issuance of long-term debt during the period */,
  "net_other_financing_charges" REAL /* Net other financing charges */,
  "operating_cash_flow" REAL /* Cash flow from operating activities */,
  "other_non_cash_items" REAL /* Other non-cash items */,
  "repayment_of_debt" REAL /* Repayment of debt during the period */,
  "dataset_version" INTEGER /* Version of the dataset */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("symbol", "as_of_date", "period_type", "currency_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "symbol" TEXT /* Stock symbol of the company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry in which the company operates */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector in which the company is categorized */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the company is headquartered */,
  "website" TEXT /* Company website */,
  "description" TEXT /* Short description of the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("symbol")
)

CREATE TABLE "period_types" (
  "period_type" TEXT /* Type of period (e.g., 12M for annual, TTM for trailing twelve months) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the period type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("period_type")
)

CREATE TABLE "currencies" (
  "currency_code" TEXT /* Currency code (e.g., USD for United States Dollar) */,
  "currency_name" TEXT /* Name of the currency */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country that uses the currency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("currency_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, auditor, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Stock symbol of the company */,
  "as_of_date" TEXT /* Date as of which the data is reported */,
  "period_type" TEXT /* Type of period for which the data is reported */,
  "currency_code" TEXT /* Currency code in which the financial data is reported */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the access (e.g., query parameters) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., analyst, auditor, admin) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Short description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user being assigned a role */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role being assigned */,
  "assigned_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was assigned */,
  "assigned_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user assigning the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag (e.g., industry, sector) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Short description of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_taggings" (
  "symbol" TEXT /* Stock symbol of the company */,
  "as_of_date" TEXT /* Date as of which the data is reported */,
  "period_type" TEXT /* Type of period for which the data is reported */,
  "currency_code" TEXT /* Currency code in which the financial data is reported */,
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tag being assigned */,
  "tagged_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the tag was assigned */,
  "tagged_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user assigning the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("symbol", "as_of_date", "period_type", "currency_code", "tag_id")
)
